title: Brownfield Access Review Observability Plan
prompt: Read `./access-review-modernization-architecture-summary.md`, `./access-review-modernization-pipeline-summary.md`, and `./access-review-modernization-risk-summary.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce the monitoring-observability artifact for this brownfield release. Focus on user-impactful signals, actionable alerts, brownfield safety visibility, and rollback health. Avoid generic dashboard sprawl.

assertions.name: maps-signals-to-real-boundaries
assertions.description: Signals are tied to real service and release boundaries rather than generic metric collections

assertions.name: avoids-noisy-monitoring
assertions.description: Avoids generic noisy dashboards that blur old and new behavior together

assertions.name: preserves-brownfield-safety-visibility
assertions.description: Makes coexistence and unsupported-flow safety visible

assertions.name: supports-incident-and-release-handoff
assertions.description: Leaves an artifact operations can act on during release verification or incident triage
